problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: The key to Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? is Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering — specifically Electrospun nanofiber scaffold — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
